'''Fenion''' was an unaligned [[Outer Rim Territories/Legends|Outer Rim]] [[Planet/Legends|planet]], near [[Warlord/Legends|warlord]] [[Zsinj]]'s territory. It was the only planet on the [[Ession Strike|''Night Caller'']] agenda not visited by [[Wraith Squadron]].

{{Planet-stub}}

==Appearances==
*''[[X-Wing: Wraith Squadron]]'' {{Ab|X-Wing: Wraith Squadron (unabridged audiobook)}}
